name: 15 Min Lemon Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the powdered sugar, melted butter/oil, and graham cracker crumbs. Press into a crust and bake as directed for a crumb crust.
2. In a separate bowl, beat the cream cheese until smooth.
3. Gradually blend in 1/2 cup of milk until smooth and creamy.
4. Add the remaining milk and lemon pudding mix to the cream cheese mixture.
5. Beat with an egg beater for 1 minute. Do not overbeat.
6. Pour the filling into the cooled crust.
7. Chill.
